validation_oracle.note: Brief assumes this oracle exists; it does not. See finding F17-000.

findings.title: Syllabus reference oracle missing
findings.summary: Required validation oracle does not exist; F17 lane has no offline ground truth for board↔chapter↔blueprint claims.
findings.remediation: Author qa/syllabus-reference/syllabus.json keyed on {board, grade, subject}.

findings.title: Lesson plan flow has no board parameter
findings.summary: LessonPlanInputSchema lacks any board field. Lesson plans always use the NCERT seed (effectively CBSE) regardless of teacher's actual board.
findings.exploit: POST /api/ai/lesson-plan {topic:'Motion', gradeLevels:['Class 10'], subject:'Science'} for an ICSE / TN / WB / UP teacher → output uses NCERT framing, chapter ordering, and pedagogy.

findings.title: Exam-paper blueprint registry is CBSE-only
findings.summary: ALL_BLUEPRINTS contains exactly 4 entries — all CBSE (Class 9/10 Math/Science). findBlueprint() returns undefined for every other board.

findings.title: Silent CBSE-shaped fallback for unknown boards
findings.summary: When blueprint is undefined, prompt instructs LLM to generate 4-5 sections with MCQ+SA+LA+case-study — the CBSE pattern. Output is labelled with the requested board name, misleading the teacher.
findings.exploit: POST /api/ai/exam-paper {board:'ICSE', gradeLevel:'Class 10', subject:'Science', …} → returns paper titled 'ICSE Class 10 Science Exam Paper' but structured as a CBSE blueprint (case study, assertion-reason, etc., none of which appear on ICSE).
findings.remediation: Replace fallback with a hard error until per-board blueprints exist; or implement blueprints (preferred).

findings.title: PYQ corpus 99% CBSE
findings.summary: 3 830 CBSE / 54 Karnataka / 36 Telangana / 0 ICSE+TN+WB+MH+UP+AP. Even if PYQs were retrieved, no per-board grounding is possible for 6 of 8 boards.
findings.evidence: grep -hoE '"board":\s*"[^"]+"' src/ai/data/pyq/*.json | sort | uniq -c → 3830 CBSE, 54 Karnataka SSLC, 36 Telangana SSC.

findings.title: NCERT seed is the only chapter index; no per-state textbook chapters
findings.summary: Chapter validation feeds off NCERT-only seed. State-board-specific chapters (e.g. WBBSE 'পরিবেশের জন্য ভাবনা', TN 'Periyar and Self-Respect Movement', TS 'Telangana Statehood Movement', MH 'Disaster Management Class 10') are unknown — the AI either hallucinates or refuses.

findings.title: TNSCERT mark cap wrong by ~7%
findings.summary: TN Class 10 Science board paper is 75 marks. Fallback honours user-passed maxMarks (defaults seen at 80) and a CBSE shape. Teachers using TN preset will get 80-mark papers that do not match the TN public exam.

findings.title: WBBSE mark cap wrong by ~11%
findings.summary: WB Madhyamik Phys Sc paper is 90 marks. Fallback yields 80-mark CBSE-shaped output.

findings.title: MSBSHSE and AP/TS two-paper structure not modelled
findings.summary: Maharashtra SSC Science is two papers (Sci-I, Sci-II) of 40 marks each. AP/TS SSC similarly splits Phys Sci and Bio Sci. The flow generates a single 80-mark paper.

findings.title: UPMSP mark cap wrong; case-study and A-R not on syllabus
findings.summary: UP Board High School Science is 70 marks and uses neither case-study nor assertion-reason items. CBSE fallback emits both at 80 marks.

findings.title: extractGradeFromTopic can override teacher's selected grade
findings.summary: When a user types 'Motion for grade 10' but Motion is a Class 9 NCERT chapter, extractGradeFromTopic overrides the user's UI selection. Output may silently target a grade the teacher did not pick. Not strictly a board issue, but commonly surfaces in CBSE Probe-1.

remediation_priority: F17-001 (add board param to lesson plan)
